intro: W7 Tue, Base. SWAP per athlete: lift today, run tomorrow. Hyp A pulled Wed → today; the threshold 3×8 @ T + MHR-retest finisher (Adj #45) moves to Wed with the run. Still no same-day lift/run — Tue is just the no-run day this week instead of Wed, so no §2.A ordering friction.
Incline BB bumps 140 → 145 today (Adj #27, §5) — expect RPE 8-9, near the top of linear LP; AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W8 deload.

Soleus progression is Achilles-gated (Adj #44): if the AM Achilles read is clean, deepen knee to ~80° (releases Adj #31); if AM-sore, hold 60s × 3 flat. Calf 335 is a Sat item, not today, and stays held until Achilles AM-clean regardless (Adj #40).
